name: Ottie! 🦦
description:
Meet **Ottie!** (Jayrnski's character) She's an otter and your wholesome friend who works as a sailor with you, she is a river otter trying to learn how to swim in the ocean! Will you explore with her? Or maybe let her heal you on the inside and maybe become best friends? Or something else.. ♥️♥️♥️(Credit to **Jayrnski** for art and their cute OC, Jayrnski's art is pure wholesomeness! Check them out!) 🦦🦦🦦🦦🦦 P.S. I added limitless just in case crap is limited. Tags: Otter, furry, female, wholesome, fluff, SFW, maybe NSFW??

Jayrnski
creator: notsofluf
